lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raag Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Dho-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਪਰਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਆਵਾ ਗਉਣੁ ਮਿਟੈ ਮੇਰੇ ਮੀਤ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam japat param sukh paaeeai aavaa gaun mittai mere meet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, total peace is obtained; coming and going is ended, my friend. ||1||Pause||
Sing the songs of Praise of the Lord.
In the Society of the Saints, one is saved.
Singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, one is enlightened,
and comes to dwell in His lotus feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਹੇਲੇ ਸਗਲ ਬਿਨਾਸੇ ਰੋਗ ਕੂਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam jap sadaa suhele sagal binaase rog kooraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chanting the Lord's Name, I am always at peace; all my illness and fraud is dispelled. ||1||Pause||
My Guru is perfect, my Guru is perfect.
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
O Nanak, he crosses over the terrifying world-ocean. ||2||1||57||
Worship and adore that One Lord alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸਰਨਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaa kee saran sadaa sukh hoe |1|
lines.english: In His Sanctuary, eternal peace is obtained. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਦ ਸੁਹੇਲੀ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਲਾਗੀ ਭੂਖ ॥
lines.translit: need suhelee naam kee laagee bhookh |
lines.english: One who feels hunger for the Naam sleeps in peace.
Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, all pains are dispelled. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਜਪੁ ਜਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar prabh kaa jap jaap |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, chant God's Chant.
Enjoy celestial bliss, O my Siblings of Destiny.
The Perfect Guru has eradicated all anxiety. ||3||
O Nanak, He Himself shall save you. ||4||2||58||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raag Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl, Partaal, Third House:
Over and over again, the Creator Lord destroys, sustains and creates.
I humbly bow to the Lord, the Supreme Being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਨ ਥਲਨ ਬਸੁਧ ਗਗਨ ਏਕ ਏਕੰਕਾਰੰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jalan thalan basudh gagan ek ekankaaran |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The One, the One and Only Creator Lord permeates the water, the land, the earth and the sky. ||1||Pause||
He has no home; He needs no nourishment. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੰਭੀਰ ਧੀਰ ਨਾਮ ਹੀਰ ਊਚ ਮੂਚ ਅਪਾਰੰ ॥
lines.translit: ganbheer dheer naam heer aooch mooch apaaran |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is deep and profound, strong, poised, lofty, exalted and infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨ ਕੇਲ ਗੁਣ ਅਮੋਲ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੰ ॥੨॥੧॥੫੯॥
lines.translit: karan kel gun amol naanak balihaaran |2|1|59|
lines.english: He stages His plays; His Virtues are priceless. Nanak is a sacrifice to Him. ||2||1||59||
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂਪ ਰੰਗ ਸੁਗੰਧ ਭੋਗ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਚਲੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਛਲੇ ਕਨਿਕ ਕਾਮਿਨੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: roop rang sugandh bhog tiaag chale maaeaa chhale kanik kaaminee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You must abandon your beauty, pleasures, fragrances and enjoyments; beguiled by gold and sexual desire, you must still leave Maya behind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੰਡਾਰ ਦਰਬ ਅਰਬ ਖਰਬ ਪੇਖਿ ਲੀਲਾ ਮਨੁ ਸਧਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhanddaar darab arab kharab pekh leelaa man sadhaarai |
lines.english: You gaze upon billions and trillions of treasures and riches, which delight and comfort your mind,
but these will not go along with you. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਤ ਕਲਤ੍ਰ ਭ੍ਰਾਤ ਮੀਤ ਉਰਝਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਭਰਮਿ ਮੋਹਿਓ ਇਹ ਬਿਰਖ ਛਾਮਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: sut kalatr bhraat meet urajh pario bharam mohio ih birakh chhaamanee |
lines.english: Entangled with children, spouse, siblings and friends, you are enticed and fooled; these pass like the shadow of a tree.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਸਰਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖੁ ਸੰਤ ਭਾਵਨੀ ॥੨॥੨॥੬੦॥
lines.translit: charan kamal saran naanak sukh sant bhaavanee |2|2|60|
lines.english: Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of His lotus feet; He has found peace in the faith of the Saints. ||2||2||60||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਓਟ ਲੇਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: re man ott lehu har naamaa |
lines.english: O mind, take the sheltering support of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਸੈ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਪਦੁ ਨਿਰਬਾਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai simaran duramat naasai paaveh pad nirabaanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Remembering Him in meditation, evil-mindedness is dispelled, and the state of Nirvaanaa is obtained. ||1||Pause||
Raag Raamkalee, Ninth Mehl, Thi-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਪਾਪ ਖੋਇ ਕੈ ਫੁਨਿ ਬੈਕੁੰਠਿ ਸਿਧਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke paap khoe kai fun baikuntth sidhaavai |1|
lines.english: The sins of countless incarnations are washed off, and he attains the heavenly realm. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਡਭਾਗੀ ਤਿਹ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਜਾਨਹੁ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: baddabhaagee tih jan kau jaanahu jo har ke gun gaavai |
lines.english: Know that one who sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord is very fortunate.
